description: Sample historical market data for testing and backtesting

markets.title: Will Trump win the 2024 Presidential Election?
markets.description: Resolves YES if Donald Trump wins the 2024 US Presidential Election.

markets.title: Will Biden win the 2024 Presidential Election?
markets.description: Resolves YES if Joe Biden wins the 2024 US Presidential Election.

markets.title: Will the Fed cut rates in January 2025?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the Federal Reserve announces a rate cut at the January 2025 FOMC meeting.

markets.title: Will Bitcoin reach $100k in 2024?
markets.description: Resolves YES if Bitcoin trades at or above $100,000 on any major exchange in 2024.

markets.title: Will the Kansas City Chiefs win Super Bowl LVIII?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the Kansas City Chiefs win Super Bowl LVIII.

markets.title: Manchester City to win Premier League 2023-24
markets.description: Market for Manchester City winning the 2023-24 Premier League title.

markets.title: Will AGI be announced by a major lab in 2025?
markets.description: Resolves YES if OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, or Meta announces achieving AGI in 2025.

markets.title: Will SpaceX land Starship on Mars by end of 2025?
markets.description: Resolves YES if SpaceX successfully lands a Starship vehicle on Mars by December 31, 2025.

markets.title: Will US Q4 2024 GDP growth exceed 3%?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the BEA reports Q4 2024 real GDP growth of 3.0% or higher.

markets.title: Will Ethereum 2.0 merge complete successfully?
markets.description: Resolves YES if Ethereum successfully transitions to proof-of-stake.

markets.title: Carlos Alcaraz to win Wimbledon 2024
markets.description: Market for Carlos Alcaraz winning Wimbledon 2024 Men's Singles.

markets.title: Will December 2024 CPI be above 3%?
markets.description: Resolves YES if December 2024 year-over-year CPI is 3.0% or higher.
